/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/core/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/model/Tower.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/model/Unit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/model/GameState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/model/GameEvent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/systems/SpawnSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/systems/MovementSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/systems/CollisionSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/systems/CombatSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/systems/RoundSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/render/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/render/TowerRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/render/UnitRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/render/HudRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/render/EffectsRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/input/KeyboardAdapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/input/InputManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/input/TikTokAdapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/audio/AudioManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/utils/Math.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tiktok_war.dir/src/utils/IdGenerator.cpp.o -o tiktok_war  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.5.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.5.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-audio.so.2.5.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.5.1
